Package com.nib.commons.io.vsam

Class AbstractVsamFile

java.lang.Object
com.nib.commons.io.AbstractFile
com.nib.commons.io.vsam.AbstractVsamFile
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractEntrySequentialFile, AbstractKeySequentialFile, AbstractRecordRelativeFile
public abstract class AbstractVsamFile extends AbstractFile
